title: Double Fatality in Charlotte Overnight Shooting
summary: Two people were killed in a shooting on Rozzelles Ferry Road, prompting a police investigation.
charlotte_impact: Highlights rising gun violence concerns and the need for community safety measures in Charlotte neighborhoods.

title: Suspect Found Hiding in Hospital Ceiling After Motorcycle Theft
summary: Two suspects arrested after being flagged by surveillance cameras driving stolen motorcycles; one hid in a hospital ceiling.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the use of surveillance technology in crime detection and the lengths suspects go to evade capture.

title: Charlotte City Council to Decide on Mayor Lyles' Replacement
summary: Charlotte City Council will decide who fills Mayor Vi Lyles' seat within two months, with the selection process outlined in June.
charlotte_impact: Details the transition process following Mayor Lyles' departure and the council's role in selecting a successor.

title: Sunshine for Mother's Day, Rain Expected Monday
summary: Mother's Day will be sunny, but a cold front is expected to bring showers and thunderstorms on Monday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast update, impacting outdoor activities and travel plans for residents.

title: East Charlotte Residents Oppose Proposed Data Center
summary: East Charlotte neighbors are pushing back against a proposed data center, demanding stronger regulations and public input.
charlotte_impact: Reflects community concerns over the environmental and social impact of data center development.

title: Councilmember Graham Discusses City Budget, Toll Lanes, Data Centers
summary: Councilmember Graham discusses the city budget, I-77 toll lanes, and land use for data centers, focusing on police pay raises.
charlotte_impact: Provides insight into key policy discussions and priorities within the Charlotte City Council.

title: Shooting in Northwest Charlotte Injures One
summary: One person was shot in northwest Charlotte; the victim was found in Huntersville and taken to the hospital.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a shooting incident, raising concerns about public safety in the northwest Charlotte area.

title: Weekend Games Canceled After Fire at Hickory Stadium
summary: Weekend games at Hickory's L. P. Frans Stadium were canceled due to heavy fire damage in the visiting team clubhouse.
charlotte_impact: Impacts local sports events and highlights the damage caused by the fire incident at the stadium.

title: Traffic Backed Up on I-85 in Charlotte Due to Collisions
summary: Two separate crashes caused traffic backups on I-85 in Charlotte on Saturday afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Informs commuters about traffic disruptions and potential delays on a major highway.

title: Two Deadly Crashes in Catawba County Within Hours
summary: Two deadly crashes occurred in Catawba County within hours of each other; no charges are expected.
charlotte_impact: Reports on fatal traffic incidents, raising awareness about road safety in Catawba County.

title: Deadly Crash on I-85 South in Charlotte Under Investigation
summary: Emergency crews responded to a deadly crash on I-85 South near Little Rock Road early Saturday morning.
charlotte_impact: Details a fatal traffic accident, prompting investigation and highlighting the dangers of highway travel.

title: Competency Hearing Scheduled for Zarutska Murder Suspect
summary: A competency hearing is scheduled for Decarlos Brown, charged with the murder of Iryna Zarutska.
charlotte_impact: Provides updates on a high-profile murder case and the legal proceedings involved.

title: Woman Raped at Vape Shop in North Charlotte, Suspect Arrested
summary: A woman was raped at the Arbor Smoke Shop in north Charlotte; a suspect has been arrested.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a violent crime, raising concerns about safety and security in local businesses.

title: Former Mayor Foxx Urges Rethink of I-77 Toll Expansion
summary: Anthony Foxx calls for a rethink of the I-77 toll lane expansion, citing its impact on Black neighborhoods.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about the potential negative impact of infrastructure projects on minority communities.

title: CMS Board to Review Updated Budget Proposal
summary: The CMS board will review an updated budget proposal on Friday after rejecting the superintendent's $2.1 billion proposal.
charlotte_impact: Covers developments in education funding and the CMS board's decision-making process.
